title: Flexzion Small Mortar and Pestle Set Marble Stone Crusher (White) - 4 Inch, 1/2 Cup Capacity Muddler and Bowl, Kitchen Hand Grinder for Spices, Herbs, Pills
description:
About this item
Efficient Grinding - Our marble mortar and pestle set boasts a unique mushroom-shaped pestle for a larger contact surface, ensuring efficient grinding of spices, herbs, and pills with minimal effort
Quality Marble - Constructed from natural marble, our pestle and mortar set is durable and elegant, adding a touch of sophistication to your kitchen while being sturdy enough for daily use
Space-Saving Design - Measuring 4 inches with a 1/2 cup capacity, this stone grinder for kitchen is space-saving and easy to handle
Versatile Functionality - Our mini mortar and pestle set can be used as a grinder and crusher and can also be used as a beautiful decoration
Easy to Maintain - After use of our small mortar and pestle set for pills, spices, herbs, rinse the spice grinder hand crusher under water and allow it to air dry. With its non-porous quality, marble resists odors and stains
reviews_5s:
I bought this because have to give my dog a pill every day and she won’t take it unless I grind it up and put it in some cottage cheese. I have a marble mortar and pestle set but my son broke the long pestle grinder, I was going to buy a replacement but the cost for just a pestle was the same as this whole set and this is so sturdy that it won’t break unless you drop it. Love it, Love it.This is a solid pill crusher bowl, and it's well made too! It crushes pills into powder easily without effort! Even though the inside of the bowl has grooves, getting the crushed pills out of the bowl is effortlessly!This item is exactly what I needed. Well made and worth it.My fresh herbsI've wanted a mortar and pestle for a long time. Wish this came with care instructions. There's a specific way to care for these when they're stone.This marble mortar and pestle set from Flexzion is well constructed and is attractive, Coming straight out of the box, there were no evident chips or cracks. Both the bowl of the motor and the surface of the pestle are smooth to the touch.

The shorter knobby handle of the pestle is comfortable to hold. There is a lot of surface area to the grinding portion of the pestle. The pestle fits comfortably and smoothly into the motor. This will be easy to hand wash when needed. You should be able to grind a decent portion of spices needed when cooking.

The pricing on this small, 4 inch diameter mortar and pestle set is fair. The quality is good, and with the larger grinding surface of the pestle, your task of grinding your herbs and spices should be easy and quick.My last mortar and pestel (that I've been using for years) was a metal one.. I saw this and decided to try it out! It works so much faster and easier than my metal one... this is sturdy/ heavy, and easy to clean.. it is a bit smaller but not a deal breaker. I would recommend it!A great shape and very easy to use. I suffer with wrist issues. This item grinds food easily with less effort required than more standard designs
